title: mRNA_V2545_PLAC
extract_protocol_ch1: For Placenta tissue, samples were mechanically homogenised, RNA was harvested using Rneasy mini kit. For STB-EVS, RNA was harvested with the miRCURY RNA isolation kit. Illumina TruSeq-stranded total RNA 20020597 was used with an equal amount of total RNA (depending on the sample type) for the construction of sequencing libraries.,RNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using standard Illumina protocols
data_processing: Illumina Casava1.7 software used for basecalling.,Sequenced reads were trimmed for adaptor sequence, and masked for low-complexity or low-quality sequence, then mapped to hg38 whole genome using HISAT2 on usegalaxy.org with default settings (Galaxy Version 2.2.1+galaxy0) and features were counted with featureCounts (Galaxy Version 2.0.1+galaxy1),Gene count tables were analysed for differential expression with DESEQ2 in R,Genome_build: hg38,Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Matrix table with DESEQ2 normalised gene counts for every gene and every sample,Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Matrix table with raw gene counts for every gene and every sample
contact_department: Nuffield Department's of Women's and reproductive health

data_processing: Illumina Casava1.7 software used for basecalling.,Sequenced reads were trimmed for adaptor sequence, and masked for low-complexity or low-quality sequence, then mapped to hg38 whole genome using HISAT2 on usegalaxy.org with default settings (Galaxy Version 2.2.1+galaxy0) and features were counted with featureCounts (Galaxy Version 2.0.1+galaxy1),Gene count tables were analysed for differential expression with DESEQ2 in R,Genome_build: hg38,Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Matrix table with DESEQ2 normalised gene counts for every gene and every sample,Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Matrix table with raw gene counts for every gene and every sample
contact_department: Nuffield Department's of Women's and reproductive health
